CustomField.description: Renewal Price adjusted to take care of NFR renewals; Renewal Price should be 90% of Sale Price for below NFRs; RBK-R334-01-NFR, RBK-R334-02-NFR, RBK-R344-01-NFR, RBK-R344-02-NFR, RBK-R348-01-NFR
CustomField.formula: IF(Order_Service_Item__r.Product_Name__c ='RBK-R334-01-NFR' || Order_Service_Item__r.Product_Name__c ='RBK-R334-02-NFR' || Order_Service_Item__r.Product_Name__c ='RBK-R344-01-NFR' || Order_Service_Item__r.Product_Name__c ='RBK-R344-02-NFR' || Order_Service_Item__r.Product_Name__c ='RBK-R348-01-NFR', IF( ISPICKVAL( Product__r.SBQQSC__EntitlementConversion__c , 'One per quote line' ),Order_Service_Item__r.Quantity*Order_Service_Item__r.UnitPrice *0.1, Order_Service_Item__r.UnitPrice *0.1 ), IF( ISPICKVAL( Product__r.SBQQSC__EntitlementConversion__c , 'One per quote line' ),Order_Service_Item__r.Quantity*Order_Service_Item__r.UnitPrice, Order_Service_Item__r.UnitPrice))
CustomField.label: Renewal Price
